name: Pirkanmaa (Finland)

colors.symbolism: the golden field of the regional arms
the red embattled chief and charges of the arms

description: A square yellow flag with a red embattled (castle-wall) upper section, the heraldic banner of the Pirkanmaa regional coat of arms.
history: Pirkanmaa became a region under Finland's 1997 administrative reform; its banner is the heraldic flag of the regional coat of arms, the embattled chief recalling the medieval Pirkkala parish.

features.symbolism: a red embattled chief evoking the medieval Birkkala/Pirkkala parish and its long-distance traders (pirkkamiehet) who held northern trapping rights from the Crown.
